detaileddescription.para: Client is idle, waiting for initialization
Actively opening TCP socket connection to host
Formatting and transmitting HTTP request lines
Receiving and parsing HTTP response header blocks
Streaming response body content back via callback
Connection failed, timed out, or parse error occurred

briefdescription.para: States for the HTTP client cooperative state machine.

memberdef.definition: typedef bool(* SYN_HttpBodyCallback) (const uint8_t *data, size_t len, void *ctx)
memberdef.name: SYN_HttpBodyCallback

briefdescription.para: Callback invoked to stream chunks of the HTTP response body.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the received chunk of body data.
Length of the data chunk in bytes.
User-defined context pointer passed to syn_http_client_init().

simplesect.para: true to continue reading body, false to abort.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_HttpClient *client, const char *method, const char *host, uint16_t port, const char *path, const char *content_type, const uint8_t *body, size_t body_len, const SYN_HttpHeader *headers, uint8_t header_count, SYN_HttpBodyCallback body_cb, void *cb_ctx, uint8_t *work_buf, size_t work_buf_size)
memberdef.name: syn_http_client_init

detaileddescription.para: Configures the request metadata, target destination, custom headers, streaming callback, and temporary work buffer.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client context to initialize.
Destination hostname or IP address string.
Type of content if body is present (e.g. "application/json").
Pointer to binary data to transmit as request body (or NULL).
Length of the request body in bytes.
Optional array of custom HTTP headers to append.
Number of custom headers in the array.
Callback function for streaming response chunks.
User context passed through to the body callback.
Working buffer for socket buffering and parsing.
Size of the working buffer in bytes.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, or an error code on invalid parameters.

briefdescription.para: Cooperative task to drive the HTTP client.

detaileddescription.para: Yields while resolving, connecting, transmitting requests, and streaming the response body chunks. Must be run inside the cooperative scheduler.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the cooperative protothread structure.
Pointer to the corresponding task control block.

simplesect.para: PT_WAITING, PT_EXITED, or another protothread status code.

briefdescription.para: Cooperative HTTP/1.1 client — streaming, zero-alloc, non-blocking.

detaileddescription.para: Performs HTTP GET and POST requests over a TCP socket as a cooperative protothread task. Response bodies are delivered via streaming callback.
